name: Asparagus Almondine
recipeIngredient: Dash garlic powder or onion powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over low heat.
2. Add the sliced almonds and garlic powder to one side of the skillet.
3. Cook until the almonds are toasted, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the asparagus to the other side of the skillet and cover with a lid.
5. Continue cooking until the asparagus is tender, about 10-12 minutes.
6. Spoon the almond butter over the asparagus and top with parsley if desired.
